programme.title: The Block
programme.sub-title: Season 16 - Episode 8: Guest Ensuite Room Reveal
programme.desc: (PG) Scotty's brother makes a welcome appearance on site and the judges deliver their verdict on the team's guest ensuites. Who will take out the $10,000 prize money?

programme.title: The Block
programme.sub-title: Season 16 - Episode 9: Master Bedroom & Walk-In-Robe Week
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block: Episode
programme.desc: Couples compete to renovate properties under strict deadlines and budgets in a high-stakes reality contest. They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.

programme.title: The Block
programme.sub-title: Season 16 - Episode 10: Master Bedroom & Walk-In-Robe Week
programme.desc: (PG) The Block is full of razzamatazz as Shelly and Scotty morph into gameshow hosts in the hotly contested agent challenge "Block It In"

programme.title: The Block
programme.sub-title: Season 16 - Episode 11: Master Bedroom & Walk-In-Robe Week

They design, build, and style spaces while facing challenges, judging, and intense competition each week. Their finished homes are auctioned, with profits determining the winners in a dramatic finale.
